prompt: Transform the original mirror selfie into a minimalist illustration-over-photo artwork. Keep the person completely photorealistic while replacing the surrounding environment with bold hand-drawn red marker line art. Outline the ornate vintage mirror frame, hallway, elevator, plants, tray, bottle, wicker basket, and foreground objects using loose sketchy red ink lines on a clean white background. Preserve the original pose, outfit (black baseball cap, beige overshirt, white T-shirt), facial expression, lighting, and composition. Create a high-contrast mixed-media effect where only the subject remains realistic and everything else appears as an expressive monochrome red line drawing. Modern editorial aesthetic, clean negative space, minimalist, artistic, high detail.
